title: gladiolus pusillus
intro: Gladiolus pusillus, also known as the lesser cornel or small gladiolus, is a perennial plant belonging to the Iridaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gladiolus pusillus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its therapeutic properties.
